admin.no_authority: 🌸 "Interesting... but you lack the authority." — Robin
admin.owner_only: 🌸 This page belongs to the captain of this archive.
admin.sudo_only: 🌸 Only the archaeologists of Ohara may touch this record.
group.only: 🌸 I can read a group history only inside a group.
ban.no_target: 🌸 "Interesting... but who should I restrain?" — Robin
ban.success: 🌸 {target} has been banned. Even the sea of knowledge has shores. Reason: {reason}
unban.success: 🌸 {target} may return. The archive remains watchful.
kick.success: 🌸 {target} has been escorted out. Some doors close so others may open.
unmute.success: 🌸 {target} may speak again. Use the page wisely.
warn.limit_reached: 🌸 {target} has reached the warning limit. Taking action: {action}.
warn.none: 🌸 No active warnings. This page is clean.
warn.reset: 🌸 Cleared {count} warnings from {target}. The record has been amended.
filter.removed: 🌸 Filter removed. The page has been cleared.
filter.none: 🌸 No filters are archived for this group.
welcome.default: 🌸 Welcome to {chat}, {first}. Every great crew began with a single member.
welcome.saved: 🌸 Welcome text archived. The next arrival will be recorded properly.
welcome.reset: 🌸 Welcome text restored to Robin's default note.
rules.saved: 🌸 Rules archived. Even the Void Century deserved documentation.
rules.empty: 🌸 No rules have been archived for this group yet.
flood.configured: 🌸 Flood limit set to {limit} messages per 5 seconds.
flood.detected: 🌸 Too many words obscure the truth. Slow down.
ai.flagged: 🌸 This message casts a shadow in the archive: {category} ({score}).
note.saved: 🌸 Archived. Even the Void Century deserves documentation.
error.generic: 🌸 Something resisted the record. I will keep reading.
